mnemonic: beauty [бъю'тьи] красота - Красота-то какая. Врагов (бьют и) не жалеют.

examples.eng: Beauty is only skin deep.
examples.ru: Красота обманчива. / С лица воду не пить. / Красота не глубже кожи.

examples.eng: She was a beauty in her day.
examples.ru: В своё время она была красавицей.

examples.eng: Beauty inheres in art.
She's a creature of rare beauty.
Sleeping Beauty was enchanted
the beauty of the New England landscape
She is a ravishing beauty.
You should have seen the boat — a real beauty.
examples.ru: Вы бы видели эту лодку — настоящая красавица.

examples.eng: She was considered a great beauty in her youth.
examples.ru: В юности её считали необычайно красивой.

examples.eng: Helen's timeless beauty
They were in the flower of youth and beauty.
examples.ru: Они были в расцвете молодости и красоты.

examples.eng: We explored the natural beauty of the island.
examples.ru: Мы открывали для себя естественную красоту этого острова.

examples.eng: The beauty of e-mail is its speed and ease of use.
examples.ru: Вся прелесть электронной почты заключается в её скорости и простоте использования.

examples.eng: the timeless beauty of the sea
the sublime beauty of the night
the sublime beauty of the canyon
He was captivated by her beauty.
The beauty of the place enchants.
an island renowned for its beauty
Her voice has a raw poetic beauty.
examples.ru: В её голосе есть какая-то грубоватая поэтическая красота.

examples.eng: Are our ideals of beauty changing?
the beauty of nature's grand design
the scenic beauty of the countryside
the beauty of Shakespeare's language
She has the fragile beauty of youth.
the nonpareil beauty of Helen of Troy
The female form is a thing of beauty.
a woman of surpassing grace and beauty
the unworldly beauty of the Grand Canyon
The beauty of the music carried him away.
